Close IsIso bareBC and the per-sigma X-level Beck-Chevalley (Stacks 02KG/02KH, Cech separated route): the essential-image member node is discharged by the affine heart of Cohomology/AffinePushPullEssImage.lean, so openImmersion_beckChevalley — g'^*(p_* p^* F) iso p'_* p'^*(g'^* F) over a restricted cartesian square with p the inclusion of an affine open V0, X separated, F quasi-coherent — and twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma are sorry-free and axiom-clean. The square is specialized to p = V0.iota (the form all consumers use); per-sigma transports along the isoOfRangeEq slice iso via pushPullObjCongr and coverInterOpen_baseChange_eq. Unconditional file: 7 -> 5 leaf sorries; full lake build green (8640 jobs).

Rewire Pic^♯ to the real relative Picard functor: picSharp := relPresheaf ∘ forget (Kleiman §2 Thm 2.5 route — under a k-rational point the plain relative functor already equals its étale sheafification, so FGA representability is stated against it directly). Representability of the chosen PicScheme is now PROVED (choose_spec), and the abelian group-scheme structure on Pic_{C/k} is PROVED by Yoneda transport (CommGrpObj.ofRepresentableBy) — stronger than the old GrpObj sorry. Deleted the false global instance asserting every presheaf quotient representable (smoothProperQuotient keeps its hypothesis class at use sites; Kleiman lm:qt needs quasi-projectivity, inexpressible in current Mathlib). FGA sorries 7→3, all remaining sorry statements now TRUE under [HasRationalPoint C].

Blueprint: coordinated repin of the relative-Picard headline family (closes I-0062 drift) and FGA route-(b) restatement. def:rel_pic_sharp / lem:rel_pic_sharp_functorial now pin the honest H_T-coset declarations relPresheaf/relFunctorial; the absolute iso-class functor survives as new node def:abs_pic_functor with the quotient comparison. FGA chapter: representability stated for pointed curves via Kleiman §2 Thm 2.5 (new node def:has_rational_point), picSharp node repinned to the real functor, group-scheme theorem marked proved (Yoneda transport), false global smooth-proper-quotient instance documented and its node removed, 7-sorry closure plan rewritten to the new 3-sorry accounting. IdentityComponent chapter: degree/kPoints statements carry the HasPicScheme hypothesis.

Pullback of quasi-coherent modules along an arbitrary scheme morphism is quasi-coherent (Stacks 01BG): localize g^*F along the preimage cover, identify (g^*F)|_{g^{-1}U} with the pullback of F|_U along the restricted morphism (pseudofunctor square), and transport the presentation — enabled by finality of the opens-preimage functor of any continuous map, whence g^* O_X ≅ O_Y

Close the FBC RHS tilde leaf (Stacks 02KG): f'_*(g'^*(j_sigma_* j_sigma^* F)) ≅ (Spec psi)_* tilde(N') as the composite of the per-sigma X-level Beck-Chevalley (twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma) with the altitude-2 bridge at the base-changed data, quasi-coherence of g'^*F supplied by the new Stacks-01BG pullback stability; FBC leaf count 5 → 4

Pic⁰_{C/k} is now a real definition: Pic0Scheme C := GroupScheme.IdentityComponent (PicScheme C). The two gates landed with the picSharp rewire — GrpObj (Pic_{C/k}) is genuinely proved (Yoneda transport), and local finiteness (Kleiman §4 th:main(1)) is a new conditional typed-sorry carrier PicSchemeLocallyOfFiniteType (true under a k-rational point). All §1 identity-component substrate theorems (clopen subgroup, subgroup homomorphism, geometric connectedness, base-change iso) now apply to Pic⁰ definitionally. IdentityComponent sorries 6→5; Pic0Scheme axiom-clean; consumer signatures in Pic0AbelianVariety carry the two instance hypotheses; blueprint nodes def:pic_zero_subscheme / def:pic_scheme_lft updated.

Blueprint: record Stacks-01BG general pullback quasi-coherence (5 new nodes: opens-preimage finality, g^* O_X ≅ O_Y, per-slice presentation transport, 01BG) and mark lem:coverinter_rhs_iso_tilde proved; split the corner identification N' ≅ N ⊗_R R' into its own open node lem:coverinter_rhs_tensor_rewrite; register the new module in the root import list; refresh TO_USER FBC status (leaves 5 → 4, warn that pullback_preservesFiniteLimits is not an adjointness freebie)
workspace[0007 r3] ground: integrate 0015-ground

Pic^0_{C/k} group structure and abelian-variety assembly: prove Nonempty (GrpObj Pic0Scheme) via the identity-component subgroup theorem applied to Pic_{C/k} (Pic0.grpObj), specialise geometric irreducibility from the abstract substrate, assemble Pic0.isAbelianVariety = proper ∧ smooth ∧ geomIrred ∧ GrpObj sorry-free, and drop the now-derivable group-structure hypothesis of tangentSpaceCotangentDual; Pic0Scheme.isAbelianVariety moved to Pic0AbelianVariety.lean and proved. Remaining sorries in the A.3 cone: tangentSpaceIso, smooth, proper

Truncated-exponential splitting of the dual-number unit group (Kleiman 5.11 opening brick): 1 → (R,+) → (R[ε])ˣ → Rˣ → 1 split exact, (R[ε])ˣ ≃* Rˣ × (R,+), natural in R via the functorial ring map R[ε] →+* S[ε] — new module Picard/DualNumberUnits.lean (axiom-clean, green), 15 blueprint nodes in sec:pic0_trunc_exp wired into the thm:pic0_tangent_space_iso proof

Close the 02KG affine-reduction heart pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange: carve the restricted cartesian square into a ring pushout (Spec-cartesian implies pushout, by fully-faithful Spec), rewrite the base-changed corner sections as N ⊗_R R' along the corner ring map, and close with the affine brick affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange; FBC leaves 4 → 3; blueprint: heart + tensor-rewrite marked leanok, ring-pushout carve node added, bogus mathlib anchor repointed

Prune the superseded canonical-mate route to flat base change: delete the two unclosable stub theorems affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso and flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso (zero consumers; the live route is the concrete-tilde affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange feeding cech_flatBaseChange) and their four blueprint nodes; repoint the Quot-scheme consumer to the Čech 02KH node; FlatBaseChange.lean is now sorry-free
Update TO_USER: FBC heart closed + mate route pruned (3 leaves remain); v4.31 migration debt verified cleared (49 genuine open sorries remain project-wide)

Hygiene: remove orphaned RationalCurveIso.{body,new,skeletal} chapter fragments from the project root (RR.4 effort never landed — no such Lean module or blueprint chapter exists; content recoverable from ledger history; twin copies remain in SubProjects/Albanese, out of this session's write scope)
Flattening stratification for a relative curve: ofCurve closed by instantiating the main theorem at pr_T (properness by base change)
QuotScheme: relocate Lane F affine-section chain below the union-merge substrate (order-safe, verbatim) so Stacks 01I8 machinery is available to it

Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin closed: pullback of a quasi-coherent sheaf along fromSpec is tilde of its V-sections, with the Sigma-pair unit identity (bijectivity of the base map via unit_leftAdjointUniq + restriction-unit components; iso via the now-live tilde-Gamma counit). QuotScheme sorries 12 -> 11
Blueprint: complete proof for lem:tildeIso_of_isQuasicoherent_isAffineOpen (Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin) matching the landed Lean proof; mark proof leanok
